programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, on relève le piquant avec les gastronomes gourmets Tony Singh et Cyrus Todiwala. Les chefs sont accompagnes de David Harper et Natasha Raskin.Partant de Dundee, ils descendent la côte est de l’Écosse jusqu’au village de Rosewell, dans le Midlothian, pour une vente aux enchères. Cyrus demontre un talent certain pour negocier, tandis que Tony n’hesite pas à afficher ses prix.Tony decouvre pourquoi une ville ecossaise a ete le foyer de nombreux millionnaires, et Cyrus prend ses marques en mer en apprenant pourquoi Anstruther etait un port de peche cle au XIXe siècle.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In this episode, the two candidates Stephany Mora and Harleena will compete on an imposed theme. Today, the theme is vineyards. They will have one hour to take the best picture possible. Let’s see who will win.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Franco-Danish painter, Camille Pissarro. You will discover his labour with View from Louveciennes, A path through the fields, Pontoise or Peasant girl making a fire.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Prussian painter, Caspar David Friedrich. You will discover his labour with The Wanderer above the mists, Greifswald port or the Lone tree.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Leonard de Vinci est l’un des artistes les plus adules au monde. De nombreux films et series documentaires se sont interesses à son genie hors du commun, sans pour autant preter attention à ce qu’il y a de plus parlant : son art. Les tableaux et dessins incomparables de Leonard de Vinci seront au centre de notre film et Exhibition on screen vous presentera la totalite des tableaux qui lui sont attribues. Marquant les 500 ans de la mort de ce genie, ce documentaire est une reference sur Leonard de Vinci, le premier à raconter son histoire dans sa globalite.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Lynne Faulds Wood and John Stapleton
programme.desc: Un Road Trip en couple de celebrites – les journalistes primes John Stapleton et Lynn Faulds Wood.Ils sont rejoints par Thomas Plant et Margie Cooper pour cette aventure. Avec 400 £ chacun, les equipes commencent à Wrightington, dans le Lancashire, et se dirigent vers Stockport pour une vente aux enchères.Lynn et Thomas se retrouvent litteralement jusquaux genoux dans des antiquites en cherchant de vieilles boîtes à biscuits, tandis que Margie tente de convaincre John que des lampes rares feront un joli profit.John apprend comment un Americain a revolutionne les transports publics britanniques, et Lynn decouvre pourquoi on traite du lait de serpent à Liverpool.

programme.title: Rothko – Hartung: Colors and Cataclysms
programme.desc: Rothko and Hans Hartung forged a discreet, friendly and fertile bond. This documentary introduces the discovery of this little known and fascinating complicity between both artists.

programme.title: Andy Warhol, Fluorescent
programme.desc: Warhol, revolutionary and controversial, was never afraid to break the mold and reshape the reals of art, advertising, and directing. But who was the real man being behind the colors in which he hid? Was it the art or the fame that controlled and spawned his unique creativity?

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: It was not until he was 27 that Vincent van Gogh decided to become a fulltime artist. And yet, in the ten years until his death he made more than 900 paintings. His influence on painting has been enormous. His use of color and compositions have inspired generations after him. The team of Masterpiece examines the paintings and finds everything between the layers. And if they are lucky, they might discover something special. We know a lot about Van Gogh’s life through correspondence with his brother. But exactly what he looked like remains a mystery. If we strip the self-portrait of the characteristic lines, we have a change to look this masterpainter in the eye….

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to the discovery of the exhibition " Split air – Bamboo art in Japan " at the Quai Branly Jacques Chirac Museum. Bamboo art in Japan appeared quite late but continues today thanks to contemporary artists. Throughout this exhibition we will be able to observe works from different periods of this movement.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Established as a pictorial genre in its own right during the Renaissance, the female nude became one of the most important subjects in European painting. Under pretexts both mythological (Titian’s “Venus of Urbino”) and biblical (Rembrandt’s “Bathsheba at her Bath”) or Oriental (Ingres’“Great Odalisque”), the female body was unveiled. These pretexts vanish with Manet’s “Olympia”, a simple portrayal of a contemporary woman naked, which resulted in scandal.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Architectures
programme.sub-title: Le centre municipal de Saynatsalo dAlvar Aalto
programme.desc: Un chef-d’œuvre humaniste d’Alvar Aalto au cœur de la Finlande. Un hommage moderne à la Cite Ideale de la Renaissance Italienne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En 2013, la Norvège celebra le 150e anniversaire de la naissance dEdvard Munch (1863-1944), lune des figures proeminentes de lart moderne. Munch 150, coproduite par le Musee national et le Musee Munch, est dejà acclamee comme « lexposition dune vie ». Linteret general est enorme, comme le temoigne le resultat record de la mise aux enchères publiques de lun de ses quatre tableaux, Le Cri, soit 120 millions de dollars. Cette presentation vous amènera dans les coulisses de la mise en place de cette exposition, en plus de comprendre une visite guidee de la Norvège qui brossera la biographie de cet homme dont la vie sest etalee de la moitie du 19ème siècle jusquà loccupation allemande lors de la Seconde Guerre mondiale.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: C’est l’un des artistes les plus controverses et pourtant, l’un des plus influents. La collection de Picasso contenait principalement des Renoir. Matisse le venerait. Monet egalement. Renoir a ete crucial dans la creation du mouvement impressionniste, avant de le rejeter totalement pour se lancer dans un genre radicalement different, avec beaucoup de succès. La Collection Barnes à Philadelphie possède plus de toiles de Renoir que n’importe quelle autre galerie au monde et c’est là que nous tenterons de lever le voile sur l’histoire remarquable de cet incroyable artiste.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans l’Ouest de la banlieue parisienne, nous allons à la decouverte de l’atelier de l’artiste Jerôme Zonder. Depuis plus de 10 ans, l’artiste developpe un travail virtuose centre sur le dessin. Realises au fusain ou à la mine de graphite, ses œuvres sombres et souvent très realistes suscitent à la fois admiration et effroi. Puissant et complexe, l’art de Jerôme Zonder captive par ses prouesses techniques et questionne notre rapport à la violence.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Jessica Dimmock, photographer. She is the recipient of numerous international awards for her photography and video work. Her first feature film The Pearl received the Grand Jury Prize at the Dallas International Film Festival. She is published by famous streaming platforms, television channels, newspapers and many other recognized media.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, well talk with Jordan Matter, photographer. He has created a series called "the 10 minute photo challenge" that can be seen on an online video platform, in which he photographs dancers in unusual situations. He likes this process because having only 10 minutes to take pictures forces him to not think too much and to take the picture in the moment.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Lynne Faulds Wood and John Stapleton
programme.desc: Un Road Trip en couple de celebrites – les journalistes primes John Stapleton et Lynn Faulds Wood.Ils sont rejoints par Thomas Plant et Margie Cooper pour cette aventure. Avec 400 £ chacun, les equipes commencent à Wrightington, dans le Lancashire, et se dirigent vers Stockport pour une vente aux enchères.Lynn et Thomas se retrouvent litteralement jusquaux genoux dans des antiquites en cherchant de vieilles boîtes à biscuits, tandis que Margie tente de convaincre John que des lampes rares feront un joli profit.John apprend comment un Americain a revolutionne les transports publics britanniques, et Lynn decouvre pourquoi on traite du lait de serpent à Liverpool.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two favourite Blue Peter presenters Sarah Greene and Peter Duncan are in the company of Natasha Raskin and Catherine Southon as they hunt for antiques around Surrey, Hertfordshire and North West London. Peter detours to learn how hockey became a popular sport the world over while keen aviator Sarah sees how the Battle of Britain was won. An incredible haul of antiques, including chimney pots, Pinocchio and a pair of African fertility figures, go under the gavel at an auction in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « Les Tournesols » sont parmi les tableaux de Van Gogh les plus celèbres. Le musee Van Gogh à Amsterdam a consacre une exposition à ces œuvres et « Exhibition on screen », qui a eu un accès exclusif à l’evenement, nous guide à travers l’exposition pour enqueter sur les mystères qui entourent ces tableaux. Le film nous amènera egalement à Tokyo, Philadelphie, Londres et Munich pour suivre les 5 principales œuvres de l’exposition.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: Secret treasures takes you on a journey to discover the unsuspected secrets and treasures of the National Assembly in France. Some of the most delicate works are kept in the greatest secrecy. But this place, which is the temple of the French democracy, opens its doors to us exceptionally today. We will make you discover this emblematic universe, more known for its political episodes than for the treasures that it shelters.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Phil Grabsky, realisateur recompense à plusieurs reprises, pose un regard neuf sur celui qui est sans conteste l’artiste le plus aime au monde en utilisant les mots du peintre lui-meme. Moi, Claude Monet revèle de nouvelles facettes de l’homme qui a donne naissance au mouvement impressionniste grâce à un tableau et qui fut certainement l’un des peintres les plus influents et renommes du XIXe et du debut du XXe siècle. Tourne à travers l’Europe, sur les lieux où il a peint, Moi, Claude Monet est une exploration filmique inedite et intime de certains des decors cultes les plus apprecies de l’art occidental.

programme.title: China-France: Glory of civilizations
programme.desc: As of the 17th century, Chinese objects fascinated the kings of France while French tapestries and astronomical instruments impressed Emperor Kangxis China. A look back at four centuries of artistic dialogue between East and West, in the magnificent settings of the Palace of Versailles, the Forbidden City and Jingdezhen.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Rembrandt at the National Gallery, London and Rijksmuseum, Amsterdam
programme.desc: Every Rembrandt exhibition is eagerly awaited, but this exhibition organized by Londons National Gallery and Amsterdams Rijksmuseum was an unprecedented event. The documentary highlights the historic Rembrandt exhibition, while tracing his life. Rembrandt is one of the greatest artists who ever lived, and this deeply moving documentary seeks to explore the truth about the man behind the legend.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le collectionneur danois : de Delacroix à Gauguin
programme.desc: Wilhelm Hansen fut un homme d’affaires visionnaire, qui vecut au Danemark au XIXème siècle. Il fut l’un des rares collectionneurs à s’interesser aux peintres impressionnistes, à une epoque où ils etaient attaques et denigres. Le film nous amène dans la maison d’ete de Hansen dans la banlieue de Copenhague et nous fait visiter l’extraordinaire exposition à la Royal Academy de Londres consacree à sa collection.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Le musee d’Orsay, qui fut dabord une gare construite pour lExposition universelle de 1900, abrite la production artistique du monde occidental sur la periode de 1848 à 1914. De nombreux courants artistiques y sont presentes : academisme, realisme, symbolisme, Art nouveau, et bien sur l’impressionnisme avec des œuvres et des artistes incontournables tels que l’Olympia de Manet, le Bal du moulin de la galette de Renoir, l’Etoile de Degas ou le Cirque de Seurat.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Tanni Grey Thompson and Jade Jones
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, nous sommes dans le Nord-Est de lAngleterre avec les grandes paralympiennes en fauteuil roulant Tanni Grey-Thompson et Jade Jones. Tanni, avec son impressionnant palmarès de medailles et de records, est accompagnee de sa jeune protegee Jade, qui debute sa carrière en athletisme.Avec les experts Phil Serrell et David Harper, la baronne du comte de Durham et Jade, de Middlesbrough, partiront à la recherche dantiquites à vendre lors dune vente aux enchères à Harrogate.Tanni tente egalement sa chance dans la fabrication traditionnelle du verre, tandis que Jade decouvre lhistoire de lhomme qui fut un pionnier du design dans la region.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In this episode, the two candidates of the day, Thibaud Poirier and Antoine Guillou, will have one hour to realize their photo session. They will have to take the best possible photos on the imposed theme of architecture in the 12th district of Paris, and then they will have 30 minutes to edit their photos.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Spanish painter, Francisco de Goya. You will discover his labour with Lunch in the Countryside, The third of may 1808 or the Cannibals.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Flemish painter, Pierre Paul Rubens. You will discover his labour with Samson and Dalilah, The four philosophers or The education of Marie de’Medici.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Matisse au MoMA et à la Tate Modern
programme.desc: Decouvrez l’œuvre de Matisse à travers les expositions de la Tate Modern à Londres et du MoMA de New York (2014) et profitez de la performance originale de la danseuse etoile du Royal Ballet Zenaida Yanowsky, qui interprète les couleurs et le dynamisme de la peinture de Matisse sur la musique jazz de Courtney Pine. Ponctue d’entrevues avec des experts ainsi que d’images d’archives rares de Matisse au travail, ce documentaire permettra d’apprecier tout particulièrement le dernier chapitre de la carrière du peintre et notamment ses gouaches decoupees.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Genre pictural existant depuis l’Antiquite, la nature morte connut un regain d’interet à partir du XVIIe siècle dans la peinture europeenne. Representation composee d’elements inanimes, elle peut se limiter à la table d’un repas, comme dans le frugal Dessert de gaufrettes de Lubin Baugin, ou d’animaux chasses comme dans la Nature morte au faisan de Jean-Baptiste Oudry. Retrouvez egalement des natures mortes celèbres de Chardin, Cezanne et Van Gogh.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: In the late 18th century (between 1775 and 1779), Claude Nicolas Ledoux built a monumental factory for the King of France in Franche-Comte. A revolution in architecture, a decade before the full-blown Revolution. Ledoux wanted to reinvent architecture, just as Rousseau wanted to reinvent the Social Contract, by returning to the sources, to "natural principles". It was both an aesthetic revolution, an innovative industrial site and the nucleus of an ideal city that would never see the light of day.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Goya : visions de chair et de sang
programme.desc: Francisco Goya, considere comme le fondateur de l’art moderne, est l’artiste espagnol le plus acclame. En plus d’observer avec talent la vie et le passe mouvemente de l’Espagne, c’est un portraitiste doue et un commentateur social par excellence. Avec Goya, l’art du portrait atteint de nouveaux sommets. Cette exposition majeure de la National Gallery de Londres remet son genie en lumière. À travers une formidable collection d’oeuvres uniques et de lettres de Goya, nous analysons l’homme lui-meme et le monde qu’il peignait.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « J’envie les Japonais », ecrivait Van Gogh à son frère, Theo. Grâce à l’exposition sur laquelle est base ce film, « Van Gogh et le Japon », au musee Van Gogh d’Amsterdam, on comprend pourquoi. Bien que Vincent van Gogh n’ait jamais visite le Japon, il reste le pays qui a eu le plus d’influence sur lui et son œuvre. En se rendant dans les galeries d’art japonais à Paris et en creant sa propre image du Japon après des recherches approfondies, des collections d’estampes et de longues discussions avec d’autres artistes, la decouverte des œuvres japonaises entraîna la carrière de Van Gogh dans une nouvelle direction très excitante.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vermeer and music - the art of love and leisure
programme.desc: La National Gallery de Londres propose un nouveau regard sur lun des plus grands artistes de tous les temps, Johannes Vermeer. Il est le peintre de la celèbre toile “La Jeune Fille à la perle”. Dans une exposition intitulee "Vermeer et la musique : Lart de lamour et des loisirs

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Pieter Bruegel the Elder, (1525-1569) is one of the most renowned Flemish painters of the Renaissance. Although influenced by Italian art, his paintings maintained a typically Flemish tradition. A “peasant” painter, he depicted the lives of his country’s common folk as in the “Peasant Wedding”. In “Netherlandish Proverbs”, he wittily transcribes dozens of popular sayings. Admire also his incomplete “Tower of Babel”, a theme which Bruegel made into his own speciality.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It’s a journey into antiquity with glamorous historians Suzannah Lipscomb and Kate Williams. Paired with experts David Harper and Catherine Southon they Road Trip from Bletchley in Buckinghamshire to an auction in London. There’s also opportunity to hear how Mrs Beeton became the first ‘domestic Goddess’ and why Luton played a critical role in the fashion world when hats were de rigueur daily wear. David and Suzannah gamble on a giant ant while Catherine and Kate plump for a very large tea urn.

programme.title: China - Masters of the Arts
programme.sub-title: Yan Gongda - The Art of Calligraphy
programme.desc: While the hieroglyphs of Egypt and the cuneiform of Babylon have disappeared, Chinese calligraphy, also graphic and non-alphabetic, has endured through the ages. Of divinatory origin, Chinese characters carry not only a language but a unique way of thinking. A 84th-generation descendant of one of Confucius’s best-known disciples, calligrapher Yan Gongda unrolls before our camera the timeless story of a writing art closer to painting than graphology. Through this story, the entire history of China is told.

programme.title: Museum Tour
programme.sub-title: L’aube du pop art - Dans l’œil de Fernand Leger
programme.desc: Museum Tour is a series that invites the viewer to discover unique which, for the artists chosen, have been incubators of creativity and a source of inspiration. Under their patronage, some of those sites have been turned into museums or foundations where their memory and work have picked up a life of their own.Each of the episodes will tell the story uniting the artist with a particular place, seeking intimacy in the process.This show’s agenda is decidedly visual. Works of art and the places in which they’re set will be filmed in such a way as to arouse strong emotions, thus placing the viewer in the spot, as if they were present in the flesh. This angle for the spectacular and search for beauty will enhance the accessibility of the series for an uninformed audience.A family-friendly documentary series which, beyond the fascinating information provided, offers a sight, sound and emotional journey into a captivating, palpable and contemporary form.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: Secret treasures takes you on a journey to discover the unsuspected secrets and treasures of the National Assembly in France. Some of the most delicate works are kept in the greatest secrecy. But this place, which is the temple of the French democracy, opens its doors to us exceptionally today. We will make you discover this emblematic universe, more known for its political episodes than for the treasures that it shelters.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Joaquin Boz habite et travaille à Buenos Aires. C’est ici, dans la capitale de l’Argentine, qu’il pratique son art à mi-chemin entre abstraction et performance corporelle. Sa peinture est recouverte de couches toujours plus nombreuses. Ces tâches, ces mouvements, ces traits et ces raclures, sont le fruit de la transmission des formes et des couleurs depuis son corps vers la toile dans une performance physique de l’artiste qui puise son inspiration dans le courant expressionniste.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Painting the Modern Garden - Monet to Matisse
programme.desc: Passionne d’horticulture, Monet reste sans conteste le maître de la peinture de jardins dans l’histoire de l’art, mais il n’etait pas seul. Des artistes tels que Van Gogh, Bonnard, Picasso et Matisse ont utilise le jardin comme thème fort de leur œuvre. Ces grands artistes, ainsi que bien d’autres noms celèbres, sont rassembles dans une exposition innovante du Cleveland Museum of Art et de la Royal Gallery of Arts de Londres. De l’exposition elle-meme à la beaute des jardins d’artistes comme celui de Monet à Giverny, nous partons en voyage pour decouvrir comment le jardin moderne etait utilise pour explorer de nouvelles idees radicales et merveilleuses.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le collectionneur danois : de Delacroix à Gauguin
programme.desc: Wilhelm Hansen fut un homme d’affaires visionnaire, qui vecut au Danemark au XIXème siècle. Il fut l’un des rares collectionneurs à s’interesser aux peintres impressionnistes, à une epoque où ils etaient attaques et denigres. Le film nous amène dans la maison d’ete de Hansen dans la banlieue de Copenhague et nous fait visiter l’extraordinaire exposition à la Royal Academy de Londres consacree à sa collection.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedy legend Jennifer Saunders and best pal, top actress Patricia Potter take to the road on a humdinger of a trip. Joined by veteran antiquers Phillip Serrell and Mark Stacey they shop in Berkshire, Hampshire and Oxfordshire before heading for an auction in Greenwich, London. Jennifer and Phil detour to hear about Fred Karno, the man credited with inventing slapstick comedy. While Patricia and Mark learn how a surgeon from Reading used his incredible sense of smell to successfully treat soldiers injured in World War One.And, Phil gets custard pied – what’s not to love?

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discuss with Ralph Gibson, American photographer. He is well known for his black and white photography, with which he has produced 34 books during his career with his own publishing company. A former assistant of Robert Franck, from whom he draws his inspiration, he has received many prestigious awards, and in 1999, the Maison Europeenne de la Photographie devoted a retrospective of his career to him.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "The Pushkin Museum: five hundred years of master drawings" at the Fondation Custodia in Paris. The works are displayed in such a way that visitors can observe the evolution of drawings over five centuries. There are drawings by the Italian artist Frederico Zuccari (or Zuccaro) but also the Dutch artist Peter Paul Rubens.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Karel Appel’s father forced him to take over the hairdressing business, but Karel only wanted one thing: to become a painter. And he did: A great master ahead of his time, a world famous painter even. In 1949, when he was still unknown and penniless, he made "Child, Church, Animal". Actually nothing is known about the construction of this painting. Not more than you can discover at first sight. To find out more, we have to take a closer look at the work using a microscope. It seems as if the work consists of several layers.

programme.title: Rothko – Hartung: Colors and Cataclysms
programme.desc: Rothko and Hans Hartung forged a discreet, friendly and fertile bond. This documentary introduces the discovery of this little known and fascinating complicity between both artists.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: John Singer Sargent: Fashion and Swagger
programme.desc: John Singer Sargent is known as the greatest portrait artist of his era. What made his ‘swagger’ portraits remarkable was his power over his sitters, what they wore and how they were presented to the audience. Through interviews with curators, contemporary fashionistas and style influencers, Exhibition on Screen’s film will examine how Sargent’s unique practice has influenced modern art, culture and fashion.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Après deux ans d’exposition itinerante, en 2015 "La Jeune Fille à la perle” est retournee au musee Mauritshuis de La Haye. Du haut de ses 350 ans, l’eternelle Jeune Fille a toujours su conserver son aura de mystère et son charme. La preuve, c’est le nombre de curieux (1,2 millions) qui ont accouru pour l’apercevoir lors de son sejour au Japon. Le documentaire cherche à decouvrir les nombreuses enigmes de cet extraordinaire tableau et de son createur mysterieux - Vermeer. Qui etait cette fille ? Pourquoi et comment Vermeer a-t-il peint ce tableau ? Venez voyager dans le temps pour decouvrir Johannes Vermeer, visiter le charmant musee de La Haye et repondre à toutes ces questions.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Without Camille Pissarro, there is no Impressionist movement. He is rightfully known as the father of Impressionism.It was a dramatic path that Pissarro followed, and throughout it all he wrote extensively to his family. It is through these intimate and revealing letters that this gripping film reveals Pissarro’s life and work.Born in the West Indies, Pissarro found his passion in paint as a young man in Paris, and by the age of 43 had corralled a group of enthusiastic artists into a new collective. Their first show was scorned by the critics, but the group had acquired a new name: the Impressionists. For the next 40 years Pissarro was the driving force behind what has today become the world’s favourite artistic movement.The Ashmolean Museum has a long tradition of excellence. As the UK’s first ever public museum (it opened its doors in May 1683) it houses a wonderfully rich collection, including the remarkable Pissarro archive. With exclusive access to most extensive archive of.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Jean-François Millet (1814 - 1875) was a 19th-century French realist painter, pastellist, engraver and draughtsman. He is best known for his realistic rural scenes.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Lynne Faulds Wood and John Stapleton
programme.desc: Un Road Trip en couple de celebrites – les journalistes primes John Stapleton et Lynn Faulds Wood.Ils sont rejoints par Thomas Plant et Margie Cooper pour cette aventure. Avec 400 £ chacun, les equipes commencent à Wrightington, dans le Lancashire, et se dirigent vers Stockport pour une vente aux enchères.Lynn et Thomas se retrouvent litteralement jusquaux genoux dans des antiquites en cherchant de vieilles boîtes à biscuits, tandis que Margie tente de convaincre John que des lampes rares feront un joli profit.John apprend comment un Americain a revolutionne les transports publics britanniques, et Lynn decouvre pourquoi on traite du lait de serpent à Liverpool.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Édouard Vuillard. You will discover his labour with Sleep, The Piano or Portrait de madame Henri Vaquez.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Titien. You will discover his labour with Pastoral concert, The resurrection of Christ or Venus with organist.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: We embark on a unique journey around the world to film our series but behind the scenes explore the effects of stress on the human body. Equipped with cutting-edge Hexo Skin sensors and other wearable tech, we subject ourselves to adrenaline-pumping activities like skydiving and roller coaster rides, as well as draining experiences like red-eye flights. By monitoring real-time data, we gain fascinating insights into how various stressors impact our physiological responses. From heart rate fluctuations to sleep monitoring this episode reveals how stress can be both an exhilarating and exhausting experience. As we push the limits of adventure—and our own comfort zones—we discover that creating a health series can be a surprisingly stressful endeavor in itself. Tune in to uncover the multifaceted impact of stress on our well-being and learn what we can do to manage it effectively.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Norway - Friluftsliv (Open Air Life) Part I
programme.desc: We travel to Tromsø, Norway, to discover Friluftsliv, a philosophy that values reconnecting with nature for well-being. Alongside the Sámi people, we learn to live in harmony with the Arctic environment, even during long, dark winters. The deep bond between the Sámi and reindeer shows how nature is a source of happiness and healing.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Norway - Friluftsliv (Open Air Life) Part II
programme.desc: A climb in the Lyngen Alps leads us to an untouched mountain summit, followed by a spectacular ski descent. We then dive into the icy Arctic waters to explore a unique underwater world, ending the day with a Norwegian sauna experience. This episode highlights the physical and mental benefits of connecting with the elements.

Guillaume and Sabrina start with a targeted warm-up, focusing on the neck, shoulders, and back. Then, they introduce boxing movements to build arm strength and improve coordination. Cardio exercises are included to raise the heart rate and boost endurance. All in a motivating atmosphere—ideal for an energy boost from the comfort of home!

Use this steady rhythm to inform your every moment of your life and practice.

programme.desc: A dynamic sequence for your upper body, Open and Ground will work your torso with a series of restorative and heart opening poses. By keeping a steady connection to the earth and lifting and opening the chest, the experience of opposing forces can be fully explored.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest Gaëtan qui va tenter de prouver que lAs de la deco, c’est lui. Ce Lillois de 38 ans est un veritable autodidacte qui ose tout. Il na d’ailleurs pas hesite à revendre lintegralite de son ancienne decoration moderne et epuree pour repartir à zero du jour au lendemain. Passer dune ambiance à lautre, rien de plus facile pour Gaëtan !

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest au tour dEmmanuele, un Montois de 29 ans, de relever le defi. Ce gerant dune boutique vintage a un style bien à lui. Pour Emmanuele, le secret dune bonne deco se cache dans la precision. Voyons comment ce perfectionniste à l’extreme s’en sort avec notre thème “jungle urbaine”.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: La semaine touche à sa fin. Celine, Aurelie, Gaëtan et Emmanuele vont faire face aux critiques de leurs adversaires. Mais surtout, les proprietaires vont enfin rentrer chez eux et decouvrir leur pièce entièrement redecoree. Que penseront-ils de leur nouvel interieur ? Quels points vont-ils attribuer ? Car leurs notes peuvent tout faire basculer et renverser le classement actuel. Qui remportera la competition ? Qui repartira avec les 2000 € et le titre d’As de la deco de la semaine ?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, were off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... Well then head to the cherry capital, Ceret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... Well cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. Well then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, well discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas etre deçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Decouvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits preferes des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au meme titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Cote recettes, Julie fera decouvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous reserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien etre.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Tendre et savoureux, l’agneau tient une place preponderante dans la cuisine festive mais aussi dans celle de tous les jours. Du Pays Basque au Cotentin en passant par Paris, Julie part donc sur les routes de France à la decouverte des differentes races et types delevage existant à travers le pays. Il faut dire que la France a lune des productions les plus variees au monde. Il existe plus dune quarantaine de races repertoriees en 5 categories : precoces, d’herbage, rustiques, merinos et laitières. Mais plus qu’à la race, c’est à la façon dont ils sont alimentes qui interesse les fins connaisseurs. Julie nous fait decouvrir ses producteurs et cuisiniers de ce met raffine !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Wellness cuisine is not synonymous with sadness and insipidity. It can be extremely gourmet, for a balanced way to indulge yourself. On this theme, Luana welcomes young wellness pastry chef Johanna Le Pape. Together, they will prepare recipes that are both tasty and perfectly balanced: corn pizza with vegetables and peach-cassis and verbena puffs...

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Leftovers often end up in the garbage can. But with a little thought, its easy to recycle them. This ecological and economical gesture can even delight our taste buds. Like us, Luana Belmondo hates throwing things away. She knows all about waste-free cooking and has mastered the art. She shows us how to reinvent boiled or steamed potatoes as something other than mashed potatoes. On the program: potato souffle with paprika and vegetable gratin with curry.

programme.title: Tropical Home
programme.desc: Laura Botella left her life in Spain to embrace happiness in El Nido, Philippines, breaking societal norms to create her own path and call it home.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: A land of character, Corrèze is full of hidden treasures. From Collonges-la-Rouge, a flamboyant red sandstone town, to the Cistercian abbey of Aubazine, and through Beaulieu-sur-Dordogne and its medieval heritage, each place bears witness to a rich past. But beyond its monuments, this region is also seductive for its untouched nature and its passionate inhabitants, guardians of an age-old legacy.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: With Bangladesh as a running thread, Yann Arthus-Bertrand meets several people who have changed their lives to dedicate themselves to a major project. In Bangladesh, Yves and Runa Marre have created the Friendship Foundation. Among other things, they’ve created a floating hospital installed on an old barge bought in France. Julie Andersen, an ex-advertising executive from New York has come to South Africa to defend sharks with her Shark Angels Foundation. In North India, Kartik Satyanarayan is helping to stop the dreadful exploitation of the lippus bears (dancing bears). He’s created Wildlife SOS, a preserve to rehabilitate the bears that have been rescued and to give work to the men of the tribe who were traditionally bear tamers and entertainers.

programme.desc: Stabilize and Center allows for the creation of a deeper connection with your core, as well as the present moment. Through the practice of conscious breathing, movement and attention to the postures, a state of centered awareness can be cultivated.

They emphasize the importance of warming up properly to prevent injuries and maximize effort. The entire body is engaged, from legs to arms, with exercises designed for home workouts. Fun and accessible, this session is perfect for solo practice or a family workout.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Core Connection: Strengthen Your Center to Cultivate Core and Balance
programme.desc: A bold sequence, Core Connection uses confident poses to help you embrace your inner strength and let go of any tensions you might encounter. Use this balancing sequence to cultivate peace of mind, even through awkward or challenging situations.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Une nouvelle semaine de competition commence. Anthony, Vanessa, Samia et Gregory ont rendez-vous à latelier. Le premier pretendant au titre d’As de la deco est Anthony, 35 ans. Ce Lillois, photographe et blogueur, est tombe très tôt dans la potion magique de la deco, puisque ses parents tenaient une boutique de decoration. Depuis, pour notre Obelix à la sauce design, cest devenu une veritable passion !

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: In this episode of Home Training, the team invites you to a 100% chair-based session! Sabrina leads you through gentle but effective exercises that activate the whole body. Starting seated with a full warm-up, you’ll flow through varied moves — all with a chair. The vibe is light, friendly, and fun, making it easy to stay motivated. It’s the perfect routine for all levels, even in small spaces.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: This week, it is 80 kms from the capital, in Fontainebleau, that Julie is putting down her bags. Fontainebleau, a name famous throughout the world, a magical name which evokes for some a forest, for others a castle, a name which still shines with its royal history. The forest of Fontainebleau has inspired the art world since the beginning of the 19th century. Landscape painters such as Corot and Millet drew inspiration for their works there. But Fontainebleau has many other treasures in its bag, and gastronomy is part of its heritage. This is what Julie will discover through three recipes: Quail with grapes, raspberry and poppy pie and crayfish grave.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Open and Ground: Stretch Your Shoulders and Strengthen Your Upper Back
programme.desc: A dynamic sequence for your upper body, Open and Ground will work your torso with a series of restorative and heart opening poses. By keeping a steady connection to the earth and lifting and opening the chest, the experience of opposing forces can be fully explored.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Cap au Nord pour decouvrir une ville française absolument incontournable : Lille. Cette ville possède un patrimoine architectural exceptionnel, marchande dès le Moyen Age, citadelle sous Louis XIV, industrielle au XIXe...elle sagrandit au cours des siècles. Julie ira à la rencontre de ceux qui participent à la renommee de la ville et de la region, et à travers son patrimoine culinaire avec au menu de ce voyage : la recette du coq à la bière, celle du hochepot, et sur une note sucree, une crème brûlee à la chicoree. .

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest Gaëtan qui va tenter de prouver que lAs de la deco, c’est lui. Ce Lillois de 38 ans est un veritable autodidacte qui ose tout. Il na d’ailleurs pas hesite à revendre lintegralite de son ancienne decoration moderne et epuree pour repartir à zero du jour au lendemain. Passer dune ambiance à lautre, rien de plus facile pour Gaëtan !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Si l’ete est la saison où les legumes abondent au potager, il serait dommage de ne pas savourer ceux que les saisons plus fraîches nous offrent : potages, tourtes, potees ou gratins mettent à l’honneur des legumes de saisons, ideals pour se rechauffer. Pour debuter ce nouveau voyage, un legume qui trônait dejà sur les tables de la Grèce Antique : le salsifis que Julie cuisinera avec une drôle de tourtière…L’hiver c’est aussi la saison du chou alors direction la Champagne pour y apprendre la recette de la potee locale qui devrait remplir le ventre d’un grand nombre de convives.Ce petit tour de France nous emmènera aussi à la decouverte d’orfèvres du maraîchage qui sculptent legumes et fruits d’hiver, et vous presentera differentes techniques et methodes pour sublimer vos potagers.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest au tour dEmmanuele, un Montois de 29 ans, de relever le defi. Ce gerant dune boutique vintage a un style bien à lui. Pour Emmanuele, le secret dune bonne deco se cache dans la precision. Voyons comment ce perfectionniste à l’extreme s’en sort avec notre thème “jungle urbaine”.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is a mushroom that we are going to focus on today. A mushroom, or a black diamond, some would say: the truffle.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: La semaine touche à sa fin. Celine, Aurelie, Gaëtan et Emmanuele vont faire face aux critiques de leurs adversaires. Mais surtout, les proprietaires vont enfin rentrer chez eux et decouvrir leur pièce entièrement redecoree. Que penseront-ils de leur nouvel interieur ? Quels points vont-ils attribuer ? Car leurs notes peuvent tout faire basculer et renverser le classement actuel. Qui remportera la competition ? Qui repartira avec les 2000 € et le titre d’As de la deco de la semaine ?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Wellness cuisine is not synonymous with sadness and insipidity. It can be extremely gourmet, for a balanced way to indulge yourself. On this theme, Luana welcomes young wellness pastry chef Johanna Le Pape. Together, they will prepare recipes that are both tasty and perfectly balanced: corn pizza with vegetables and peach-cassis and verbena puffs...

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Leftovers often end up in the garbage can. But with a little thought, its easy to recycle them. This ecological and economical gesture can even delight our taste buds. Like us, Luana Belmondo hates throwing things away. She knows all about waste-free cooking and has mastered the art. She shows us how to reinvent boiled or steamed potatoes as something other than mashed potatoes. On the program: potato souffle with paprika and vegetable gratin with curry.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: Defendre l’eau c’est defendre la vie - Partie 1
programme.desc: The oceans cover more than 70% of the Earths surface. The sea is the largest natural environment on our planet and remains virtually unexploited. In Brittany, in the Seven Islands. Then in the Bay of Saint-Brieuc, in the middle of a sea of green algae. In Brittany, intensive agriculture has developed over the last thirty years. In New Caledonia, the coral reef is the second largest in the world and could be threatened by the construction of a nickel mine. In Normandy, in the Botanical Garden of Vauville, an extraordinary garden has plants from all over the world. Also in the Archipelago of Chausey in Normandy with the highest tides in Europe. Or the Mont Saint Michel. As a result of silting up and man-made works, the Mont was no longer an island. In Italy, in Venice, on the verge of drowning, major development work, industrialisation and tourism have upset the environment. In New Caledonia, flying over the heart of Voh is surrounded by the largest lagoon in the world. 24,000 km2 prot.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of Home Training focuses on a full-body workout using a chair as the main tool. Guillaume and Sabrina guide viewers through simple yet effective exercises like squats, leg raises, and glute-strengthening moves. They emphasize the importance of warming up properly to prevent injuries and maximize effort. The entire body is engaged, from legs to arms, with exercises designed for home workouts. Fun and accessible, this session is perfect for solo practice or a family workout.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Stabilize and Center: Strengthen Your Core and Open Your Hips
programme.desc: Stabilize and Center allows for the creation of a deeper connection with your core, as well as the present moment. Through the practice of conscious breathing, movement and attention to the postures, a state of centered awareness can be cultivated.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C’est à nouveau sur les routes de France que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Julie pour parler d’un produit incontournable des tables françaises : le fromage. Plus qu’un engouement gourmand, plus qu’une friandise de fins de repas, le fromage est associe à l’image de la gastronomie française, et d’ailleurs reconnu patrimoine immateriel par l’UNESCO. Les français ne s’y sont pas trompes : avec près de 1 000 varietes - des pâtes molles, aux pâtes cuites, persillees, ou encore pressees, et avec 45 Appellations, nous sommes les plus gros consommateurs de fromage au monde !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrenees Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte dAzur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While were all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: A good breakfast is a healthy, balanced meal made up of 5 energy-giving elements: protein, fiber, carbohydrates, healthy fats and hydration. Luana Belmondo offers us a healthy breakfast that will satisfy both salty and sweet palates: oatmeal, avocado and salmon, buddha bowl with chia seeds and seasonal fruit, and vegan panacakes.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her Italian friend Alessandra Pierini are preparing a pasta party. Theyll be cooking pesto and sharing their tips on how to get it right. Theyll also be making pasta saporita, full of color and flavor!

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her pastry chef friend Laurent Favre-Mot prepare desserts from our childhood. On the program: panettone in French toast, and torta della nonna with lemon cream and pine nuts, a typical Italian dessert!

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous allons voyager au Mexique avec les fajitas ! Un plat typique de la cuisine tex-mex. On va preparer ensemble des tortillas (galettes de maïs). Et pour la suite, des fajitas avec du poulet, des poivrons et des epices.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: A land of character, Corrèze is full of hidden treasures. From Collonges-la-Rouge, a flamboyant red sandstone town, to the Cistercian abbey of Aubazine, and through Beaulieu-sur-Dordogne and its medieval heritage, each place bears witness to a rich past. But beyond its monuments, this region is also seductive for its untouched nature and its passionate inhabitants, guardians of an age-old legacy.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana cuisine avec linterprète du titre phare de La Reine des Neiges : Anaïs Delva. Ensemble, elles vont preparer deux recettes 100% vegetariennes, philosophie adoptee par la chanteuse. Au menu : fettucini de courgettes grillees, haricots blancs au pesto et burger vegetarien. Comme quoi, il est possible de se regaler avec des plats vegetariens sans rester sur sa faim !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine un poisson de la Mediterranee, le rouget. Au menu : filets de rouget avec de la puree davocat et des carottes au cumin, et mille-feuille de rouget avec des legumes printaniers.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo reçoit Delphine Malachard, qui est intolerante au gluten. Ensemble, elles vont donc cuisiner des recettes sans gluten. Au menu : souffle au chocolat et financiers à la vanille et aux fruits rouges.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo cuisine la reine des proteines vegetales : la lentille. Bonne pour la sante, digeste et delicieuse, elle remplace la viande et le poisson. Nous allons preparer des galettes de lentilles corail aux epices, avec une sauce au yaourt et à la menthe. Et pour la suite, un classique de la cuisine française : une salade de lentilles vertes avec de la saucisse de Morteau.

programme.title: Massages

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: På Den iberiske halvøy gjenopprettes matkjeder og økosystemer slik at utrydningstruede arter, som verdens sjeldneste kattedyr, kan vokse i antall igjen.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: Samiske reingjetere og naturvernere samarbeider for å redde en av Europas villeste grenseland. Gjennom is og snø dannes en ny kobling mellom mennesket og villmarken.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: I fjellkjeden Karpatene, og andre godt bevarte villmarksområder, får naturen en hjelpende hånd. Med gjeninnføringen av europeisk bison og spredningen av ulv har dyrelivet fått en oppsving som gagner både mennesker og dyr.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: I Italia og Kroatia har innsatsen for å redde en sjelden bjørneart hjulpet andre dyrearter og landskaper til å vokse frem.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: Samiske reingjetere og naturvernere samarbeider for å redde en av Europas villeste grenseland. Gjennom is og snø dannes en ny kobling mellom mennesket og villmarken.

programme.title: Dyrene i USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Olympic nasjonalpark strekker seg langs Washington States tøffe kyst, og huser et unikt habitat med fire tempererte regnskoger som ikke finnes andre steder i landet. Dette spesielle landskapet har et rikt biologisk mangfold, inkludert olympiske murmeldyr, Roosevelt-elg, rødgaupe og et av de siste lakseløpene ved Stillehavet i de nedre 48 statene.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: I fjellkjeden Karpatene, og andre godt bevarte villmarksområder, får naturen en hjelpende hånd. Med gjeninnføringen av europeisk bison og spredningen av ulv har dyrelivet fått en oppsving som gagner både mennesker og dyr.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: I Italia og Kroatia har innsatsen for å redde en sjelden bjørneart hjulpet andre dyrearter og landskaper til å vokse frem.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: Europas kystlinje byr på en stor mengde dyreliv, fra det iskalde Ishavet til det rolige Middelhavet. I det forfrosne nord kjemper isbjørner og reinsdyr mot det ekstreme klimaet, mens i sørlige Frankrike løper villhester på strendene. Samtidig finner noen av verdens mest imponerende naturhendelser sted under bølgene, der spekkhoggere og knølhvaler jakter side om side.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Urfolkslærer Phil Breslin setter kursen mot konstant hete, luftfuktighet og regn i Australias regnskoger for å finne ut hva som kreves for å overleve. I tretoppene finner Phil de sky trekenguruene og babyene deres samt Australias største slange, den dødelige ametystpytonen. På bakken fungerer de fargerike kasuarene som regnskogens gartnere.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Urfolkslæreren Phil Breslin er i ørkenen i Channel Country, og søker i den endeløse sanden for å finne tre dyr som ikke bare overlever heten, men trives under ubønnhørlige forhold. Gjør deg klar til å møte Australias mes imponerende dyr: kjempevaranen, kontinentets største øgle, emuen, den raskeste flygeudyktige fuglen, og den mektige røde kjempekenguruen, verdens største pungdyr.

programme.title: Katavi - Africas Fallen Paradise
programme.desc: Midt i en ekstraordinær tørke kveles dyrene i Katavi i den intense heten. Løveunger blir angrepet av hannløver som vil ta over flokken. Og mens vannivået synker hver dag, bestemmer to flodhester seg for å kjempe mot en alfahann. Mange dyr er allerede nær ved å kollapse, og stormer i det fjerne blir skuffende når de kommer med lyn i stedet for regn.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: Europas kystlinje byr på en stor mengde dyreliv, fra det iskalde Ishavet til det rolige Middelhavet. I det forfrosne nord kjemper isbjørner og reinsdyr mot det ekstreme klimaet, mens i sørlige Frankrike løper villhester på strendene. Samtidig finner noen av verdens mest imponerende naturhendelser sted under bølgene, der spekkhoggere og knølhvaler jakter side om side.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin drar til den australske savannen på jakt etter landets mest formidable skapninger. Først møter han Australias største rovfugl, en kilehaleørn, og Australias mest aggressive slange, kysttaipanen. Senere står han ansikt til ansikt med en krageagam og dens fascinerende forsvarsmekanismer.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Urfolkslærer Phil Breslin setter kursen mot konstant hete, luftfuktighet og regn i Australias regnskoger for å finne ut hva som kreves for å overleve. I tretoppene finner Phil de sky trekenguruene og babyene deres samt Australias største slange, den dødelige ametystpytonen. På bakken fungerer de fargerike kasuarene som regnskogens gartnere.

programme.title: Katavi - Africas Fallen Paradise
programme.desc: Midt i en ekstraordinær tørke kveles dyrene i Katavi i den intense heten. Løveunger blir angrepet av hannløver som vil ta over flokken. Og mens vannivået synker hver dag, bestemmer to flodhester seg for å kjempe mot en alfahann. Mange dyr er allerede nær ved å kollapse, og stormer i det fjerne blir skuffende når de kommer med lyn i stedet for regn.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: Europas kystlinje byr på en stor mengde dyreliv, fra det iskalde Ishavet til det rolige Middelhavet. I det forfrosne nord kjemper isbjørner og reinsdyr mot det ekstreme klimaet, mens i sørlige Frankrike løper villhester på strendene. Samtidig finner noen av verdens mest imponerende naturhendelser sted under bølgene, der spekkhoggere og knølhvaler jakter side om side.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: Europas fjellkjeder ruver høyt over kystbyene og former de mest avsidesliggende områdene. De er like slående som de er farlige. Her oppe i høyden er dyrene på en evig jakt for å finne mat. Kongeørner scanner Alpene på jakt etter bytte, hjortedyr kjemper om tilgang til gressområder i det skotske høylandet, og berberapene i Gibraltar finpusser kidnappingsteknikken sin.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Fylkesmessen er i full gang. Dr. Pol er uoffisiell veterinær for arrangementet, der han sjekker dyrene før showet og auksjonen. Charles viser datteren noen av messens høydepunkter. På Pols veterinærklinikk er teamet opptatt med magesmerter, bistikk og unger. Dr. Nicole får et nødstilfelle da en shih tzu skader øyet.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Når dyrene er i nød, trår veterinærene til. En hund som har blitt påkjørt må opereres med det samme, og valpesjekken gir dr. Nicole en stor overraskelse. Dr. Lisa behandler en ku med et stort sår i beinet samt en hund som ble angrepet. Dr. Pol tar imot to hunder med magebesvær og hjelper en merr med fødselen.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Under den kalde vinteren i Michigan håndterer Pols klinikk alt fra enkle tilfeller til stygge skader. Dr. Pol og de andre veterinærene bruker spjelking, lim, sting og ekspertise i behandlingen.

programme.title: Katavi - Africas Fallen Paradise
programme.desc: Tanzanias nasjonalpark Katavi huser løver, flodhester og krokodiller som lever i harmoni med hverandre. Men når en uvanlig klimasyklus fører med seg en ekstrem tørke, blir deres fredfulle verden omgjort til en brutal kamp for å overleve. Løveunger blir angrepet av maktsyke hannløver, flodhester kjemper om elveterritorier, og krokodillene presses til det ytterste på grunn av mangel på dypt vann.

programme.title: Katavi - Africas Fallen Paradise
programme.desc: Midt i en ekstraordinær tørke kveles dyrene i Katavi i den intense heten. Løveunger blir angrepet av hannløver som vil ta over flokken. Og mens vannivået synker hver dag, bestemmer to flodhester seg for å kjempe mot en alfahann. Mange dyr er allerede nær ved å kollapse, og stormer i det fjerne blir skuffende når de kommer med lyn i stedet for regn.

programme.title: Katavi - Africas Fallen Paradise
programme.desc: Midt i en ekstraordinær tørke kveles dyrene i Katavi i den intense heten. Løveunger blir angrepet av hannløver som vil ta over flokken. Og mens vannivået synker hver dag, bestemmer to flodhester seg for å kjempe mot en alfahann. Mange dyr er allerede nær ved å kollapse, og stormer i det fjerne blir skuffende når de kommer med lyn i stedet for regn.

programme.title: Mara: Rebirth
programme.desc: Etter at støvet fra den store gnumigrasjonen i Masai Mara legger seg, blir tusenvis av dyr igjen. Fra juli til oktober, når gnuene strømmer gjennom Mara, søker det fastboende dyrelivet ly i sine egne territorier og skjermet fra kaoset. Nå er de endelig frie og kan bevege seg rundt i et gnufritt Mara. Vi avslører hvordan disse utrolige dyrene lever livene sine frem til neste juli måned.

programme.title: Mara: Rebirth
programme.desc: Etter at regnet kommer tilbake, forvandles det fredfulle Mara. Elvevannet stiger og brer seg ut over slettene, og flomlegger gresslettene og gjør paradis om til fare. Når det endelig blir skyfri himmel finner vi en servalmor som har klart seg, men hiet hennes har ikke. Mot alle odds har ungen hennes også overlevd – et virkelig mirakel under slike forhold.

programme.title: Kalahari – Africas Underground Desert
programme.desc: Kalahari holdes i live av et hemmelig samfunn av skapninger under jorden.

programme.title: Africas Wild Geniuses
programme.desc: På tvers av Afrikas ugjestmilde landskap kreves det kreativitet for å overleve. I ørkenen lærer surikatene sine små å jakte, mens hjulspinnere ruller over sanddynene på jakt etter bytte. På savannen må sekretærfugler, gjødselbiller og thomsongaseller stole på instinktene sine for å overleve. Og dypt inne i skogen viser fingerdyr og kameleoner sine ferdigheter for å overleve.

programme.title: Return of the Predators
programme.desc: Etter 30 år med krig og ødeleggelser har Gorongosa nasjonalpark i Mozambique undergått en fantastisk restaurering. Planteetere spretter atter en gang rundt på slettene, men jegerne har ikke kommet tilbake like raskt, og parken er i ubalanse… frem til nå!

programme.title: Kalahari – Africas Underground Desert
programme.desc: Kalahari holdes i live av et hemmelig samfunn av skapninger under jorden.

programme.desc: Fylkesmessen er i full gang. Dr. Pol er uoffisiell veterinær for arrangementet, der han sjekker dyrene før showet og auksjonen. Charles viser datteren noen av messens høydepunkter.
